vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of critical collapse. The registry-defined specimens (P1, P2, P3, P4) are no longer visible or have suffered total structural failure.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot is empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (Black pot is empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (White rabbit anchor remains, but Pothos is absent)
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No evidence of Silver Guest)

plant_audit.P3: The Pothos specimen has been removed or decomposed entirely; only the rabbit anchor remains.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears desiccated and devoid of organic life.
biome_observations.debris: Persistent presence of crushed eggshell fragments in the black pot, serving as a non-biological anomaly.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no signs of recent organic debris or spillover.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Minor postural shift in the Pothos leaf.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-3: Pothos leaf shows signs of chlorosis and wilting.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: Pothos leaf has collapsed against the soil surface.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Total disappearance of all plant specimens; only soil and eggshells remain.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Static state; complete absence of biological activity.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome has transitioned from a state of neglect to total systemic failure. The absence of plant matter suggests either manual removal or complete necrosis and subsequent decomposition/removal of the specimens.
anomalies: Crushed eggshell fragments (likely calcium supplementation attempt, now redundant)
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the indoor botanical collection. The sequence documents the rapid decline of the Pothos (P3) followed by the total disappearance of all specimens. The current state is a sterile environment consisting only of empty pots, soil, and the white rabbit anchor. No living plant tissue remains.
